action_group_multi_inheritance.rationale: Action groups with multi-parent inheritance (ReadOnly/AuditLogged/Destructive) composing conjunctively.

action_with_many_principals.rationale: Six principal types in `appliesTo` with `is`-narrowing for per-type attribute access.

action_without_resource_applies_to.rationale: Sentinel `Session` resource pattern for resource-less actions (Cedar requires non-empty `resource:` list).

adversarial_oscillation_bait.rationale: Engineered to stress §8.1/§8.2/§8.6/§8.8: each naive fix trades one violation for another.

age_verification_leap_years.rationale: Hand-computed conservative day thresholds for 13/18/21-year ages + Go-style duration literals.

ambiguous_spec_most_restrictive.rationale: Hedged language (`typically`, `may sometimes`) read as most-restrictive (`requires explicit grant`).

aml_kyc_tiered.rationale: Tiered KYC matrix (SDD/CDD/EDD) with amount bands + UBO/adverse-media conjunction at high amounts.

anti_transitive_delegation.rationale: Optional `delegationGrant` with has-guard + depth==1 strict equality + per-action scoping.

api_key_scoped_access.rationale: Per-action scope-string mapping + expiry/revocation forbids + submitted-invoice forbid.

approval_chain_workflow.rationale: Five actions over a state machine with `containsAll` for unanimous-consent finalize and terminal-state forbid.

audit_log_immutability.rationale: Role-based append/read/export with unconditional delete and modify forbids.

backup_restore_asymmetric.rationale: Role + boolean asymmetry for backup vs restore-to-prod requiring on-call.

business_hours_user_timezone.rationale: datetime offset by user-supplied timezone duration + `.toTime()` time-of-day extraction.

cascading_session_expiry.rationale: Two-datetime min-of via conjunctive form (Cedar has no `min`); entity in context.

causal_predecessor_chain.rationale: Optional `predecessorAuthorized` record with has-guard + sequential workflow + separation-of-duties on approve.

cert_required_role_activation.rationale: Optional record-typed `cert` with triple has-guard chain (validUntil, claimedRole, signer).

ci_cd_deployment_gate.rationale: Per-environment role threshold + boolean test-pass gate; small rule set.

clinical_add_consent.rationale: Adds one extra forbid (no consent → no edit). Single delta from base.

clinical_add_datamanager.rationale: Adds one role with clear bullet rules; reuses existing forbid structure.

clinical_add_export.rationale: Adds a new action that follows existing constraints plus one extra device-compliance gate.

clinical_add_sponsor.rationale: New role + cross-dept exception scoped to View only + Phase-3 gate; multiple interacting permits.

clinical_add_study_phase.rationale: Adds a single Phase-3 permit gate for PIs only.

clinical_base.rationale: Foundational MLS spec with role/clearance/classification + cross-dept forbid w/ auditor unless. Bullet-list form, names attributes inline.

clinical_dual_forbid.rationale: Two independent forbids with different exemption scopes (auditor exempts dept, no exempt for device).

clinical_full_expansion.rationale: Three forbids stacked (cross-dept, consent, device-compliance) with role-keyed exceptions.

clinical_relax_clearance.rationale: Single operator change (>=3 instead of >3); trivial delta from base.

clinical_remove_auditor.rationale: Removes the auditor-loophole unless clause; pure deletion.

clinical_temporal_embargo.rationale: Long-timestamp forbid with PI exception layered onto existing dual-forbid base.

common_type_definitions.rationale: Schema common type aliases (`type Address = ...`) with 3-deep nested record access (`resource.contact.address.country`).

compound_attestation_multi_signer.rationale: Three optional record-typed attestations with has-guards + 9-clause conjunction including pairwise-distinct check.

conference_room_booking.rationale: datetime + capacity check + level threshold; small rule set.

conflicting_attestation_sources.rationale: Optional `claimedOwner` with has-guard + cross-source consistency (record-of-truth vs request-claim).

content_moderation_escalation.rationale: Took 10 iterations in v1 (the hardest realworld); severity-bracketed clearance disjunction with overlapping cells confuses repair signal.

context_scoped_admin.rationale: `adminOf.contains(resource.tenant)` per action; role string is informational only.

contextual_mfa_elevation.rationale: datetime/duration `durationSince < 15m` for sensitive actions + workspace isolation; §8.9 territory.

contradicting_requirements_literal.rationale: Literal contradiction in spec (always vs never) requiring precedence-rule resolution; §8.8 stress.

coppa_under_13.rationale: datetime + duration age threshold + optional `parentalConsentToken` has-guard + asymmetric collect/share rules + COPPA-stricter sharing rule.

counterintuitive_admin_no_edit.rationale: RBAC prior resistance: auditAdmin is read-only despite the name; positive-permit encoding to avoid prior.

customer_support_ticket_escalation.rationale: Priority gating + escalated-ticket close guard + manager-only reassign.

data_lineage_ancestry.rationale: Public<internal<restricted clearance hierarchy + boolean PII gate + department-scoped derive/delete.

deceptive_progress_signal.rationale: 3×3 role/action matrix engineered as oscillation trap; near-symmetric cells with subject-scope asymmetry.

decimal_currency_comparison.rationale: Cedar `decimal` extension with method-style `.lessThan` + per-role tier + accumulated daily limit.

decimal_precision_boundary.rationale: Cedar `decimal` extension with method-style comparisons; representable-range awareness.

decoy_trivial_properties.rationale: Trivially-true floors mixed with substantive ones; tests harness counting + reporting.

deep_entity_hierarchy.rationale: Five-level hierarchy with transitive `in`; classification-gated read.

default_scope_mismatch.rationale: Cross-tenant unconditional forbid + tenant-scope default-deny override by user-scope admin role.

delegation_chain_expiry_dual.rationale: Two optional record-typed grants with has-guards + chain-of-trust continuity + dual datetime windows.

delegation_temporary_grant.rationale: Optional `activeGrant` with has-guard + datetime expiry + per-action allowedAction string match.

doccloud_add_admin_group.rationale: Adds manageACL bypass on blocking forbid; forbid/unless interaction.

doccloud_add_comment_acl.rationale: New CommentOnDocument action with clear ACL conditions.

doccloud_add_expiry.rationale: Adds expiry forbid with owner+DeleteDocument exception unless clause.

doccloud_add_version_lock.rationale: Adds one boolean forbid on isLocked.

doccloud_base.rationale: Multi-ACL doc cloud baseline with mutual blocking and Public-principal `principal has blocked` guard; foundational complexity.

doccloud_graduated_sharing.rationale: Adds 3-tier publicAccess and ViewMetadata action; clear bullet rules.

doccloud_org_isolation.rationale: Cross-entity org-mismatch forbid with manageACL exception unless clause.

doccloud_remove_blocking.rationale: Removes the blocking forbids; pure deletion.

doccloud_temporal_sharing.rationale: Stacks shareExpiry forbid (with owner exception) on top of version-lock forbid.

document_versioning_lock.rationale: Lock-bypass condition (`!isLocked || lockedBy == principal`) + admin unlock-break + draft-only publish.

dual_owner_joint_consent.rationale: Two optional record consents + order-symmetric matching + 24h freshness + has-guard discipline.

duration_arithmetic_composition.rationale: `duration.toMilliseconds()` for arithmetic (Cedar duration has no +/-) + sign guards on `durationSince`.

educational_gradebook.rationale: Optional `parentOf` with has-guard + role + class scoping + isFinal edit gate.

embargo_by_region.rationale: Per-region datetime branching (no dynamic record key access) + 24h anti-leak buffer for download.

emergency_break_glass.rationale: Bullet-list spec with same-hospital baseline forbid + narrowly-scoped break-glass permit (3 conditions).

empty_set_vacuous_truth.rationale: `[].containsAll(X) == true` vacuous-truth trap: must guard with `!isEmpty()` or default-deny is silently broken.

entity_tags_with_hastag.rationale: Cedar entity tags (RFC 0082): hasTag/getTag with negated-has trap (§8.3-style) on multiple tag reads.

enumerated_status_entity.rationale: Cedar enumerated entity type (`Status::active`) with `==` comparison; closed EID set.

exception_to_exception_emergency.rationale: Three-tier when/unless override chain (lockout → break-glass → security lockdown trumps all).

feature_flag_rollout.rationale: Numeric rolloutBucket < rolloutPercentage + role override + isEnabled gate.

ferpa_age_18_transition.rationale: datetime + duration day-threshold for age-of-majority + role-based access asymmetry.

fifteen_optional_context.rationale: Fifteen optional context booleans with conjunction over 5 specific has-guarded reads; §8.3 stress.

five_equivalent_formulations.rationale: Canonical-form invariance: 5 equivalent encodings (de Morgan, if-then-else, set-of-one) all acceptable.

five_namespace_coordination.rationale: Five top-level namespaces with cross-namespace entity-type references; qualified-name handling at scale.

five_orthogonal_forbids.rationale: Five independent boolean forbid conditions composed conjunctively over two actions.

five_way_role_intersection.rationale: Multi-role principals (primary + secondary set); §8.6 trap stress with 5 roles × 5 actions × 4 categories.

forbid_with_specific_exception.rationale: Weakened-forbid idiom: must encode owner exception inside the forbid `when`, not as a competing permit.

four_level_unless_chain.rationale: Four-tier when/unless flattening into a single permit; §8.11 ternary trap territory.

gdpr_data_retention.rationale: datetime retention + erasure-flag + role-based read/process/delete/audit asymmetry.

gdpr_dpia_required.rationale: Optional `dpiaCompletedDate` datetime with has-guard + duration `< 365d` freshness + risk-level branching.

gdpr_purpose_limitation.rationale: Set-membership purpose check + optional `compatibleUseApproval` with has-guard + per-action role gating.

github_add_close_issue.rationale: Adds close action with familiar dual-path (writer/reporter) pattern.

github_add_contributor.rationale: Adds one role with single push permit, no interactions.

github_add_locked_issue.rationale: Adds one boolean forbid on isLocked for edit_issue only.

github_add_private.rationale: Adds one boolean forbid on isPrivate for fork only.

github_add_pullrequest.rationale: New PullRequest entity with self-approval forbid plus archive-bypass extension.

github_add_security_admin.rationale: Adds securityAdmin role with archive-bypass for push only via unless.

github_add_visibility.rationale: 3-value visibility String with two equivalent forbids on fork.

github_base.rationale: Foundational RBAC with role tiers, archive-block forbid, dual-path issue ops; bullet-list spec.

github_full_expansion.rationale: Six roles, three forbids, two new entity types (PR, Issue) with archive cascade.

github_no_archive.rationale: Removes the archive forbid; pure deletion.

github_numeric_constraints.rationale: Adds two numeric forbids (collaborator limit, account-age push restriction).

github_pr_review_workflow.rationale: Three new entity types with cross-traversal + self-exclusion forbid + archive cascade.

github_private_and_locked.rationale: Compound: archive + private + locked forbids on different entities and actions.

github_remove_triager.rationale: Removes triager role and merges its assign action into writer; pure deletion.

grace_period_three_tier.rationale: Four-tier datetime interval partition with half-open boundaries (inclusive-start, exclusive-end).

group_chat_moderator.rationale: Required §8.10 — entity-graph membership liveness. `principal in resource` is opaque to symcc; switched to `resource.members.contains(principal)`.

hidden_simple_gotcha.rationale: Two ownership fields (`creator` vs `currentOwner`) with hidden creator-retention invariant requiring schema inference.

hierarchical_override_three_levels.rationale: Per-(level, category) cell encoding to avoid §8.6 + senior-cannot-execute-restricted asymmetry.

hipaa_minimum_necessary.rationale: Role-purpose-category 3-way matrix + optional `patientAuthorized` has-guard + per-action carve-outs.

homogeneous_set_type_mismatch.rationale: Set literal homogeneity validator constraint: entity-set vs string-set must not mix.

hotel_add_cancel.rationale: Adds cancelReservation matching member/admin permit pattern.

hotel_add_franchise.rationale: Adds 4th hierarchy level (Franchise) with cascade through hotel/property/reservation.

hotel_add_guest.rationale: Adds Guest entity type with single permission via reservation set membership.

hotel_add_loyalty_tier.rationale: One numeric forbid (loyaltyTier < 3) gating createReservation on premium properties.

hotel_add_renovation_lock.rationale: One boolean forbid with admin override for createReservation.

hotel_base.rationale: PermissionsMap nested record with view/member/admin tiers, multi-action surface, role-inheritance pattern; foundational complexity.

hotel_franchise_loyalty.rationale: Compound: 4-level hierarchy + renovation forbid (with admin override) + loyalty forbid (no override).

hotel_remove_hierarchy.rationale: Removes Property-in-Hotel cascade; rules become non-cascading per level.

hotel_temporal_rates.rationale: Long-timestamp seasonal forbid on viewRates with admin override unless.

hundred_check_scale.rationale: 10-role × 10-action matrix with status constraints; ~157 verification checks (scale, not depth).

hundred_tenant_isolation.rationale: 100 distinct per-tenant floors over a single string-equality permit; scale stress.

hypothetical_exception_unspecified.rationale: Hedged `normally / rare exceptions handled separately`; planner must NOT invent unspecified attributes.

if_then_else_decision_tree.rationale: Cedar expression-level if-then-else (an alternative to disjunctive desugaring); severity- and category-tiered clearances.

implicit_deny_by_default.rationale: Bullet-list of allowed (role, action) combinations; clear positive permits only.

incident_response_war_room.rationale: Severity-to-clearance mapping (sev1→3, sev2→2, sev3→1) with active/resolved log access asymmetry.

intentional_planner_contradiction.rationale: Engineered §8.8 floor-bound consistency regression test; self-blocking corner case requires floor exclusion.

inventory_warehouse_zone.rationale: Zone equality + `all` wildcard + hazardous-supervisor escalation encoded as positive permit (avoiding §8.6).

inverted_default_permit.rationale: Permit-by-default + denylist (`!bannedReaders.contains`); inversion of Cedar's deny-by-default model.

iot_device_auth.rationale: Non-User Device principal with capability-set scoping per action.

ipaddr_corporate_network.rationale: Cedar `ipaddr` extension with CIDR ranges, compromised-subnet exclusion, and admin break-glass.

itar_us_persons_only.rationale: Single-valued `citizenshipStatus` enum + deemed-export location check + per-action strictness scaling.

legal_hold_override_expiry.rationale: Multi-action interplay between expiry datetime and legal-hold flag with role-based read/edit/delete asymmetry.

like_with_escape_chars.rationale: Cedar `like` with literal-asterisk escape; glob vs regex distinction.

loan_approval_workflow.rationale: Numeric `approvalLimit >= amount` + role + `riskRating == high` escalation + state-machine guard.

long_arithmetic_overflow_avoidance.rationale: Overflow-safe `Long` arithmetic encoding (rewrite `a+b<=c` as `a<=c-b`) with explicit guards.

long_permit_25_conditions.rationale: Single permit with 25-clause conjunction across principal/resource/context attributes.

medical_prescription_workflow.rationale: Optional `controlledSubstanceVerified` with has-guard + dual-gate fill (isFilled + controlled-only check).

mega_scale_1000_checks.rationale: 50 roles × 20 actions = 1040 checks; pure scale stress, semantically simple `permit when role in [...]`.

mega_scale_500_checks.rationale: 25 roles × 20 actions; 540 verification checks (scale stress, not semantics).

missing_edge_case_empty_set.rationale: Planner must add safe-default guards (`!isEmpty()`, `!= ""`) the spec did not request.

multi_cert_chain_validity.rationale: 6-comparison conjunction over 3 independent cert validity intervals (user/org/CA).

multi_factor_resource_unlock.rationale: Graduated MFA factors per sensitivity level + role-gated rotate/revoke.

multi_forbid_floor_consistency.rationale: Four global forbids (suspension, hours, MFA, approval); §8.8 floor-bound consistency stress at 4-way boundary.

multi_tenant_saas.rationale: Tenant-isolation permit + narrow global-support cross-tenant read with two context conditions.

n_of_m_signature_withdrawal.rationale: 3-of-5 quorum encoded as 10-disjunct enumeration via `containsAll`; no `.size()` operator.

nested_namespaces.rationale: Multi-level qualified names with simple owner/team-manager/level rules.

nonce_replay_prevention.rationale: Optional `nonce` string with has-guard + Set<String> membership + 3-state distinction (missing/invalid/valid).

oop_prior_trap.rationale: OOP-flavored entity names that invite invalid Cedar idioms (methods, instanceof, null) — prior resistance.

ordered_override_resolution.rationale: Priority simulation via guards (`!(principal has customQuota) && ...` on lower-priority rules).

partial_spec_pattern_extrapolation.rationale: Lead role described only as delta from senior; planner must extrapolate full permission set.

payroll_separation_of_duties.rationale: SoD `principal != resource.initiator` + amount-thresholded role escalation forbid + terminal-state forbid.

pci_dss_cde_boundary.rationale: Data-classification gating with dual `cdeAuthorized` + `cdeMember` requirement and detokenize-only `auditCompliant`.

pii_data_classification.rationale: MLS clearance/classification hierarchy + PII forbid + need-to-know forbid + read/download asymmetry.

plateau_landscape_many_equal.rationale: Exactly-3-of-5 threshold expanded as 10-disjunct enumeration; engineered plateau where violation count is uninformative.

priority_based_role_resolution.rationale: Multi-role users via `Set<String>` + per-role permits avoiding §8.6 role-intersection trap.

priority_ordered_requirements.rationale: Three-rule priority chain encoded via explicit negation of higher-priority guards on lower-priority rules.

purpose_bound_field_access.rationale: Three separate `Set<String>` per purpose (no dynamic record key access in Cedar) + role-purpose pairing.

quiescence_window.rationale: datetime + duration `durationSince > 1h` cooldown + explicit sign-guard against clock skew.

quorum_attestation.rationale: 3-of-5 emergency-override quorum via `containsAll` over 10 enumerated subsets (mirrors n_of_m pattern).

rate_limit_by_role.rationale: Per-tier numeric limits with public/non-public endpoint asymmetry.

recurring_maintenance_window.rationale: Host-supplied window boundaries via datetime offset + role-keyed in-window vs out-of-window split.

recurring_weekly_blackout.rationale: Host-attested boolean `inBlackoutWindow` + role-keyed action routing + optional `blackoutEnds` datetime.

red_herring_attributes.rationale: Schema bloated with 14 irrelevant attributes; only 3 participate in the rule (attribute-focus discipline).

redundant_spec_single_rule.rationale: Same rule restated three different ways; planner must deduplicate to one permit.

regression_battery_all_traps.rationale: Engineered to require ALL six harness contributions (§8.1/§8.4/§8.6/§8.8/§8.9/§8.11) to fire simultaneously.

reserved_keyword_attr_name.rationale: Attribute names adjacent to Cedar reserved words (inGroup, hasAccess, likedItems, permits).

resource_budget_enforcement.rationale: Per-tier numeric quota check + tier-gated upgrade action.

revocation_cascade_reinstatement.rationale: Host-attested booleans (`accessAuthorized`, `revocationDetected`) + owner bypass independent of attestation.

role_composition_from_attributes.rationale: No `role` attribute exists; manager is computed inline from 3-conjunct attribute predicate.

role_elevation_with_attestation.rationale: Optional `elevationJustification` with has-guard + non-empty string check + role conjunction.

rolling_rate_limit_window.rationale: Dual-window numeric (per-minute AND per-hour) + cost-multiplier-adjusted budget arithmetic.

sales_add_approval.rationale: Approval-gate forbid layered on top of complex action-group + grant-restriction baseline.

sales_add_archive.rationale: Archive forbid scoped to PrezEditActions group, on top of existing customer/internal forbids.

sales_add_regional_manager.rationale: New regional_manager role with managedMarkets overlap path on top of customer-restriction forbids.

sales_add_team.rationale: Adds Team entity type and viewerTeams/editorTeams sets, mirroring market-template pattern.

sales_base.rationale: Action groups, grant restrictions, optional context targetMarket/targetUser with has-guard discipline; foundational complexity.

sales_full_expansion.rationale: Five forbids (customer, internal, archive, approval, edit-grant) layered with regional manager + delete.

sales_remove_customer_restriction.rationale: Removes the customer-grant forbids; deletion + slight rule adjustment.

sales_temporal_campaign.rationale: Long-timestamp campaign-window forbid with non-internal scope and per-action guards.

shared_inbox_delegation.rationale: Three-tier owner > delegate > member with `Set.contains` per action.

sox_three_role_sod.rationale: Two optional context attestations with §8.3 negated-has trap on cross-step SoD checks.

specification_ambiguity_needs_counterexa.rationale: Editor-or-owner OR vs AND ambiguity; floor counterexamples discriminate the readings.

stale_cache_invalidation.rationale: Three different freshness windows (5m/60s/30s) + two optional datetime attrs with has-guards + role gate on delete.

streaming_add_age_rating.rationale: datetime/duration base + new age-rating forbid (kid-only string disjunction).

streaming_add_download.rationale: datetime/duration base + new download action with isFree forbid.

streaming_add_geo_restriction.rationale: datetime/duration base + new geo forbid using set containment with negation.

streaming_add_trial_tier.rationale: Adds TrialMember entity with trialExpiry datetime check on top of base.

streaming_base.rationale: Cedar datetime/duration extension with kid bedtime forbid using offset/toTime — §8.9 syntax territory.

streaming_full_expansion.rationale: Four forbids (bedtime, geo, age-rating, free-download) stacked on the datetime/duration baseline; complex composition.

streaming_multidevice.rationale: Per-tier numeric concurrent-stream forbids on top of datetime base.

streaming_parental_controls.rationale: Adds rating hierarchy forbid with explicit string disjunction for parental controls plus bedtime cascade.

streaming_remove_oscars.rationale: Removes the Oscar promo permit + rent/buy actions; deletion.

string_prefix_domain_match.rationale: Cedar `like` operator with prefix/suffix patterns; small rule set.

subscription_content_gate.rationale: Plan/tier dominance via string disjunction + preview bypass + isActive gate.

tacit_domain_convention.rationale: `Standard RBAC, the usual hierarchy` shorthand: planner must unpack into explicit role inheritance.

tags_add_approval.rationale: Adds one isApproved forbid on Update/Delete actions.

tags_add_fourth_dimension.rationale: Adds a fourth tag dimension following identical matching pattern.

tags_add_owner_bypass.rationale: Adds dual-path Read permit (tag-match OR ownership).

tags_add_role_c.rationale: Adds new Role-C with same tag-matching pattern and a fresh action.

tags_add_sensitivity.rationale: Per-role sensitivity forbids with different thresholds (>3 vs >1).

tags_base.rationale: Multi-dimensional tag matching with ALL wildcard, optional attributes, and `containsAll` superset semantics; foundational complexity.

tags_remove_all_wildcard.rationale: Removes the ALL-wildcard branches; deletion + simplification.

tags_sensitivity_and_owner.rationale: Required §8.11 ternary detector to converge — surfaced the mechanism. Owner bypass + per-role sensitivity forbids + approval gate compose into a ternary-shaped expression LLMs reach for naturally.

tax_add_auditor.rationale: New principal type (Auditor) with serviceline-scope permit + universal consent forbid.

tax_add_client_profile.rationale: New action targeting Client with cross-entity org-record matching, separate from consent forbid.

tax_add_edit.rationale: New editDocument action with same access rules as viewDocument.

tax_add_sensitivity.rationale: Compound forbid combining sensitivity boolean with HQ team-region requirement.

tax_add_supervisor.rationale: New Supervisor principal with org-only matching, consent forbid still applies.

tax_base.rationale: Org-info record matching via `assigned_orgs.contains(...)`, consent forbid with template-link compatibility; foundational complexity.

tax_full_expansion.rationale: Three principal types (Professional/Supervisor/Auditor) × two actions × two forbids.

ten_level_hierarchy.rationale: Ten-level deep entity-in chain (Org→Co→Region→...→Individual) with attribute-based parentOrg ref for liveness.

three_way_mutual_exclusion.rationale: Three optional context attestations + has-guards + pairwise SoD across submit/approve/audit.

time_decay_permissions.rationale: Three age tiers × three actions × sign-guarded `durationSince` (negative-duration trap).

time_of_day_business_hours.rationale: currentHour Long comparison (9 ≤ x < 17) + role-based override + admin-off-hours forbid.

twenty_action_workflow.rationale: 20 procurement actions per-role gating; scale stress.

union_principal_types.rationale: Three-way principal union with `is`-typed narrowing for per-type attribute access.

webhook_signature_verification.rationale: Non-User WebhookEndpoint principal + boolean isVerified + allowedEvents containment + isInternal block.

whitelist_and_blacklist.rationale: Positive `contains` + negated `contains` on per-resource Set<Entity> + boolean trustedSource conjunction.

wide_set_50_elements.rationale: 50 distinct capability strings with single uniform `containsAll` rule; scale of liveness witnesses.
